name: Loader.io (SendGrid)
description: Loader.io (SendGrid) — Free cloud-based load testing service for testing web app endpoints with configurable concurrent users.

seo.title: Loader.io (SendGrid) — Test Automation / Device Cloud
seo.meta_description: Loader.io (SendGrid): Loader.io (SendGrid) — Free cloud-based load testing service for testing web app endpoints with configurable concurrent users.

when_to_use: Free load testing for REST endpoints with ramp-up config
Concurrent user simulation up to 100K clients
Quick API stress test before product launch
Cloud-based load generation without infra setup

pros: Dead simple UI, minutes to first load test
Generous free tier for small endpoints
cons: Small set of metrics versus k6 or Gatling
Host verification required, friction for some setups
review.verdict: A fine free warm-up tool, but not a replacement for proper scriptable load testing.
review.best_for: Small teams quickly validating a single endpoint under modest traffic
review.not_for: Serious performance engineering needing scripting and deep metrics
